Title: Verify Homepage elements
Test Steps:
1. Launch the app
2. Verify the presence of the configuration button
3. Verify the presence of the place visualization
Expected Result: The homepage is displayed correctly with the configuration button and place visualization.

Title: Verify configuration page elements
Preconditions: User clicks on the configuration button
Test Steps:
1. Click on the configuration button
2. Verify the presence of the new place visualization
Expected Result: The configuration page is displayed correctly with the new place visualization.

Title: Verify new place visualization elements
Preconditions: User is on the configuration page
Test Steps:
1. Click on a place
2. Verify the presence of the place detailed page
Expected Result: The new place visualization is working correctly, and the place detailed page is displayed.

Title: Verify place detailed page elements
Test Steps:
1. Click on a place
2. Verify the presence of the Pathfinder button
3. Verify the presence of the "Navigate", "Open in Browser", "Call Business", "Indietro", "Like/Dislike" buttons
Expected Result: The place detailed page is displayed correctly with the Pathfinder button and other options.

Title: Verify Pathfinder functionality
Preconditions: User clicks on the Pathfinder button
Test Steps:
1. Click on the Pathfinder button
2. Verify the opening of the Pathfinder page
Expected Result: The Pathfinder functionality is working correctly, and the Pathfinder page is displayed.

Title: Verify "Indietro" button functionality
Preconditions: User is on the place detailed page
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Indietro" button
2. Verify the display of the demand visualization
Expected Result: The "Indietro" button is working correctly, and the demand visualization is displayed.

Title: Verify demand visualization elements
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Indietro" button
2. Verify the presence of the question page
3. Verify the presence of the answer selection
Expected Result: The demand visualization is working correctly, and the question page and answer selection are displayed.

Title: Verify answer selection functionality
Preconditions: User is on the question page
Test Steps:
1. Select an answer
2. Verify the display of the suggested location page
Expected Result: The answer selection is working correctly, and the suggested location page is displayed.

Title: Verify suggested location page elements
Test Steps:
1. Select an answer
2. Verify the presence of the suggested location
Expected Result: The suggested location page is displayed correctly with the suggested location.

Title: Verify Yelp integration functionality
Preconditions: User clicks on the "Open in Browser" button
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Open in Browser" button
2. Verify the opening of the Yelp site on the browser
Expected Result: The Yelp integration is working correctly, and the Yelp site is opened on the browser.

Title: Verify call business functionality
Preconditions: User clicks on the "Call Business" button
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Call Business" button
2. Verify the initiation of a call to the business
Expected Result: The call business functionality is working correctly, and a call is initiated to the business.

Title: Verify preferences functionality
Preconditions: User clicks on the "Modifica preferenze" button
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Modifica preferenze" button
2. Verify the display of the preferences page
Expected Result: The preferences functionality is working correctly, and the preferences page is displayed.

Title: Verify system map functionality
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Navigate" button
2. Verify the opening of the system map
Expected Result: The system map functionality is working correctly, and the system map is opened.
